mapper.select:
SELECT w.id, w.name, w.code, w.description, w.category_id, w.version, w.status, w.nodes, w.edges, w.node_configs, w.edge_configs, w.variables, w.viewport, w.created_by, w.created_at, w.updated_at, c.name AS category_name FROM workflow_definition w LEFT JOIN workflow_category c ON w.category_id = c.id
AND w.category_id = #{categoryId} AND w.status = #{status}
AND (w.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR w.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY w.updated_at DESC
SELECT w.*, c.name AS category_name FROM workflow_definition w LEFT JOIN workflow_category c ON w.category_id = c.id WHERE w.id = #{id}
SELECT w.*, c.name AS category_name FROM workflow_definition w LEFT JOIN workflow_category c ON w.category_id = c.id WHERE w.code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_definition WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_definition (name, code, description, category_id, version, status, nodes, edges, node_configs, edge_configs, variables, viewport, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, 1, #{status}, #{nodes}, #{edges}, #{nodeConfigs}, #{edgeConfigs}, #{variables}, #{viewport}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_definition SET nodes = #{nodes}, edges = #{edges}, node_configs = #{nodeConfigs}, edge_configs = #{edgeConfigs}, variables = #{variables}, viewport = #{viewport}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE workflow_definition SET version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
